title: polypodium glycyrrhiza
intro: Polypodium glycyrrhiza, also known as Licorice fern or Yakuchim, is a type of fern native to the mountainous regions of Japan and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polypodium glycyrrhiza include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into capsules and tablets, to harness its medicinal properties and provide a natural remedy for various health concerns.
